title: Senior Doctor - Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Surat. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates:
Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates!
